summary: Design YouTube thumbnails with 17 styles, niche-specific guides, and CTR optimization. Generate complete thumbnails with text using Gemini Nano Banana Pro (4K text rendering). Actions: design, create, generate thumbnail. Niches: tech, gaming, education, cooking, fitness, business. Styles: facecam, before-after, listicle, diagram, whiteboard, bold-text, mystery, dark-dramatic. Features: AI generation with text baked in, brand identity, reference face, arrows, Google Font support.
title: akm:youtube-thumbnail-design
